name: datacite-jsonld
description: DataCite 4.6 metadata schema: JSON-LD vocabulary, JSON Schema profiles, and tooling.

scripts.validate-profiles: for f in validation-and-conversion/schemas/schema-profiles/*.json validation-and-conversion/schemas/schema-profiles/*.jsonld; do echo "=== $f ==="; npx ajv-cli --strict=false --spec=draft2019 compile -s "$f" || exit 1; done
